Registry / Terms / legal metrological control

legal metrological control

VIMLOutdated — VIML 2000 G 18 #00164 · 8 instances

Authoritative definition

VIML 2000 · concept #2.1view ↗

the whole of legal metrology activities which contribute to metrological assurance

Outdated: Cites VIML 2000. Latest: VIML 2022.
  • VIML 2000 · #2.1
    the whole of legal metrology activities which contribute to metrological assurance

Suggested actions

  1. INFO ✓ This term IS in VIML 2022 (concept #2.01). View VIML 2022 entry
